title: RNAgrinder Protocol v1.0.1
author: Rohit Satyam
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This is the second stable release of RNAgrinder. Changes made: Added module to perform RNA read classification using Kraken2 Added feature to skip various preprocessing step including Ribosomal Detection and Kraken2. Improved the help section. For older release visit here
